title: Rolson 36109 40 pc 1/4" & 3/8" Dr. Socket Set
features: Combined 40 piece 1/4" and 3/8" Drive socket set (39+1 storage box=40 pieces)
Complete with ratchet and extension bar
Range of metric and imperial sockets
Blow moulded storage case. For best results please use lubricant such as WD40
description: From the manufacturer Box Contains 3/8" Dr. reversible ratchet handle 3/8" Dr. 75mm extension bar 1/4"(m) x 3/8"(f) adaptor 3/8" Dr. x 16mm spark plug socket 150mm spinner handle 3pc 3/8" Dr. sockets mm size 14, 16, 17mm 12pc 1/4" Dr. sockets metric size: 4, 4.5, 5, 5.5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13mm 3pc 1/4" Dr. (8 point) sockets AF size 1/4, 5/16, 3/8" Spin disc Rolson 36109 Socket Set - 40 Pieces Rolson offers a wide range of tools that are suitable from everyday use by the DIY enthusiast to on-the-job professionals. Our seal of approval allows you to feel confident that your chosen product has been manufactured to international standards, which comes well presented in the unique Rolson branded packaging. Rolson are constantly aiming to increase and improve their catalogue by introducing the most exciting, innovative and reliable products possible without compromising on their values of quality and safety.
